{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Repeated connections to the LSASS pipe and loading of multiple security and domain-related client DLLs (samcli.dll, logoncli.dll, dsrole.dll) by wmiprvse.exe, which can be indicative of reconnaissance or credential access attempts.",
  "indicators": [
    "wmiprvse.exe",
    "pipe_connect",
    "lsass",
    "samcli.dll",
    "logoncli.dll",
    "dsrole.dll"
  ]
}
